Name: corporations
Description:
Equipment Rating: Average (Mercenaries)

Corporations care about the bottom line, which has advantages and disadvantages for mercenaries.  On the one hand, corporate executives recognize mercenaries as fellow independent businessmen and generally treat them with a degree of professional courtesy. On the other hand, they carefully weigh costs and benefits in every negotiation.
ReputationStatements: Our analysts project success. Try not to undermine their confidence.

MissionSuccessStatements: The analysts were right, the numbers exceeded projections. I do enjoy exceeding projections.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: A poor result. Fortunately, corporations excel at surviving poor results.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Market confidence is built over years and damaged in moments. Thank you for demonstrating the principle.
